lms_data.question: Hi, nice to see you. Ready to talk about shopping? 😄
lms_data.expectedTranscript: Yes, I am ready. I like shopping for clothes.

lms_data.question: Hello, I’m Alex. Nice to meet you 😄 What do you like to buy when you go shopping?
lms_data.expectedTranscript: I like to buy trainers and sometimes pyjamas.

lms_data.question: Nice. Lego is fun 😊 Do you buy them often?
lms_data.expectedTranscript: Yes, I buy Lego sometimes. I like building cars and houses.

result.userTranscript: I buy it when my birthday.

lms_data.question: Nice. Do you get a new set every birthday? 🎁
lms_data.expectedTranscript: Yes, I get a new Lego set every birthday.

result.userTranscript: Yes, I get a new set every birthday.

lms_data.question: Nice. What set did you get last birthday? 🎁
lms_data.expectedTranscript: I got a Star Wars Lego set last birthday.

lms_data.question: Oh, cool — a TV man set sounds fun 😊 Which character was it?
lms_data.expectedTranscript: Yes, it was a small TV man figure from Lego.

result.userTranscript: Yes, it was a big TV man.

lms_data.question: Nice — a big TV man sounds fun 😊 Did you build it by yourself?
lms_data.expectedTranscript: Yes, I build it alone. It took two hours.

lms_data.question: Hi — nice to see you. Ready to talk about shopping a little? 😄
lms_data.expectedTranscript: Yes, ready. I like shopping for clothes.

lms_data.question: I’m Sam, nice to meet you 😊 What do you like to buy when you go shopping?
lms_data.expectedTranscript: I like to buy trainers and pyjamas, sometimes cheap clothes.

lms_data.question: Cool, Legos are fun 😊 Do you buy them in a store or online?
lms_data.expectedTranscript: I buy them in a store.

lms_data.question: Nice. Where do you usually shop online? 🛒
lms_data.expectedTranscript: I usually shop on Amazon or the Lego website.

lms_data.question: Good. Do you look for cheap or expensive toys when shopping online? 😊
lms_data.expectedTranscript: I usually look for cheaper toys, but sometimes I buy more expensive sets if they are special.

lms_data.question: Nice choice, cheap can be smart. Do you compare prices before buying? 😊
lms_data.expectedTranscript: Yes, I compare prices on my phone before I buy.

result.userTranscript: Yes, I compare when I want to buy.

lms_data.question: Good. How do you compare prices when you shop online? 😊
lms_data.expectedTranscript: I check different websites and read reviews. I also look at discounts and delivery cost.

result.userTranscript: I always compare prices when I shop online.
